svg.aria-label: Alejo Viola — Senior Frontend Engineer and Design Engineer. Antiguo Astronauta: an orbital ephemeris — a dark planet with three tilted orbits, telemetry, and a drifting cursor over a starfield.
svg.title: Alejo Viola — Senior Frontend Engineer · Design Engineer
svg.desc: Antiguo Astronauta · Ephemeris — an orbital instrument banner: a dark planet, three tilted orbits with tracing bodies, mono telemetry, and a mission-control lockup.
